column1: Brain was feeling a bit nervous about his journey. He usually enjoyed_____________, but this time was different. (TRAVEL)
His mother____________him to stop worrying. "If you've checked the timetable, there's nothing to worry about", she said. (TELL)
Brain knew she_______________. How could she know how worried he was? (NOT UNDERSTAND)
"It's all right for her", he said to himself. "She__________________to go, but I do." (NOT HAVE)
Brain realised he didn't feel very well. He decided that if he still____________bad the next morning, he wouldn't go. (FEEL)
This decision made him feel a lot______________and he went to bed and slept like a baby. (GOOD)
The next morning, he woke up and took the bus to his new school for the___________time. It wasn't as bad as he'd been expected. (ONE)
As he walked through the gates, he knew this was the place for him. "it feels like the school is__________ ." (ME)
And, in a way, the school did belong to him - because Brain______________a student. He'd just become the school's new Headteacher. (NOT BE)
Do you play chess? In 1996, a chess-playing computer called Deep Blue_______________by IBM, a US computer company. (DEVELOP)
The idea behind Deep Blue was to create a computer that was capable of_______________a World Chess Champion. (BEAT)
The Deep Blue team______________the World Champion and Russian Grand Master, Gary Kasparov, to play series of matches against the computer. (CHALLENGE)
In the first match, Kasparov beat the computer. However, in the second match in 1997, he_____________by one game, much to the shock of the watching world. (LOSE)
since then, many people, including Kasparov,_______________IBM of cheating. They claim that the computer had human help during the games. (ACCUSE)
And some people said that IBM did not make_______________look very good when they refused a re-match with Kasparov. (THEY)
Instead, scientists at the company_____________the computer apart. (TAKE)
Later, one of the developers of Big Blue___________a book saying he had been happy to built a new computer but that Kasparov wasn't interested. (WRITE)
It___________possible that we will never know the full truth about what happened with Deep Blue. (BE)
